subcodes.first_line: O you who are firm in the covenant! It has been some time since I last wrote to you. God forbid that this has saddened you
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مدتیست نامه نگار نگردیدم مبادا دل فکار گردی زیرا فراموش نشدی
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
